TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == matas == gaga na matas la'iy likuy ga, siki lama tkba kwara yow na gaga mluyak, kba cminun, mlahang gaga, mnwah mgaga uy ga ptasan la. la'iy knerin mlahang sali, kba momah, kba cminun lukus ro tmami tmmyan. ba'un naha kwara yow haca laga, ptasan naha la. mlikuy ga ptasan lihuy ro yabay naha. knerin ga ptasan naha lihuy ro reyas naha. bi'an naha lalu na m'likuy baley ro lalu m'knerin baley la, ini ptasiy ga musa ssya'an cyoli naha la.
S.PHON: == matas~ɕ == ɣaɣa na matas~ɕ laʔij likuj ɣa, s~ɕiki lama tkβa kwara jow na ɣaɣa mlujak, kβa ʦ~ʨminun, mlaħaŋ ɣaɣa, mnwaħ mɣaɣa uj ɣa ptas~ɕan la. laʔij knerin mlaħaŋ s~ɕali, kβa momaħ, kβa ʦ~ʨminun lukus~ɕ ro tmami tmmjan. βaʔun naħa kwara jow ħaʦ~ʨa laɣa, ptas~ɕan naħa la. mlikuj ɣa ptas~ɕan liħuj ro jaβaj naħa. knerin ɣa ptas~ɕan naħa liħuj ro rejas~ɕ naħa. βiʔan naħa lalu na mʔlikuj βalej ro lalu mʔknerin βalej la, ini ptas~ɕij ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕs~ɕjaʔan ʦ~ʨjoli naħa la.
S.FORM: == matas == gaga na matas la'iy likuy ga, siki lama tkba kwara yow na gaga mluyak, kba cminun, mlahang gaga, mnwah mgaga uy ga ptasan la. la'iy knerin mlahang sali, kba momah, kba cminun lukus ro tmami tmmyan. ba'un naha kwara yow haca laga, ptasan naha la. mlikuy ga ptasan lihuy ro yabay naha. knerin ga ptasan naha lihuy ro reyas naha. bi'an naha lalu na m'likuy baley ro lalu m'knerin baley la, ini ptasiy ga musa ssya'an cyoli naha la.
S.PHON: == matas~ɕ == ɣaɣa na matas~ɕ laʔij likuj ɣa, s~ɕiki lama tkβa kwara jow na ɣaɣa mlujak, kβa ʦ~ʨminun, mlaħaŋ ɣaɣa, mnwaħ mɣaɣa uj ɣa ptas~ɕan la. laʔij knerin mlaħaŋ s~ɕali, kβa momaħ, kβa ʦ~ʨminun lukus~ɕ ro tmami tmmjan. βaʔun naħa kwara jow ħaʦ~ʨa laɣa, ptas~ɕan naħa la. mlikuj ɣa ptas~ɕan liħuj ro jaβaj naħa. knerin ɣa ptas~ɕan naħa liħuj ro rejas~ɕ naħa. βiʔan naħa lalu na mʔlikuj βalej ro lalu mʔknerin βalej la, ini ptas~ɕij ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕs~ɕjaʔan ʦ~ʨjoli naħa la.
